Found three differences

data.policy
  ± whitespace only change
    - {"effect":"allow","actions":["read","write"],"resources":["*"]}
    + {↵··"effect":·"allow",↵··"actions":·[↵····"read",↵····"write"↵··],↵··"resources":·[↵····"*"↵··]↵}↵

data.config
  ± value change
    - {"debug":false,"timeout":30}
    + {"debug":true,"timeout":30}

data.notes
  ± value change
    - this is a plain string
    + this is a different string
